ConstructorArguments: Adds a new physics body to this object.

Documentation.Summary: Adds a new physics body to this object.
Documentation.Return: A new <see cref="T:Sandbox.PhysicsBodyBuilder" /> for configuring the body.

Params.mass: The mass of the body. Default is <c>0</c>.
Params.surface: The surface properties to apply. Default is <c>default</c>.
Params.boneName:
Optional name of the bone this body is attached to.  
Leave empty for non-skeletal bodies.
